jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Firstcry - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Firstcry. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About Firstcry:
Firstcry is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Firstcry!
